mission.title: crossplane: feat(compositions): Support patching from Environment
mission.description:
### Description of your changes

Design: https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3008

Fixes: #2099 

This adds a new cluster scope CRD `EnvironmentConfig` that is similar to a standard `ConfigMap` but allows storing arbitrary values instead of just strings.

`EnvironmentConfig`s can be used in compositions using the new `FromEnvironmentFieldPath` patch type.

The main use case of this PR is to use to build a generic Crossplane package that can run in multiple environment without having to

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:

Design: https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3008

Fixes: #2099 

This adds a new cluster scope CRD `EnvironmentConfig` that is similar to a standard `ConfigM

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
resources:
    - base:
        apiVersion: rancher2.rancher.jet.crossplane.io/v1alpha1
        kind: Project
        spec:
          forProvider:
            clusterId: ?
      patches:
        - toFieldPath: spec.forProvider.clusterId
          from: <reference to the cluster id exposed by MyClusterXR - MyClusterXR-123.status.atProvider.id>
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3008. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
### Description of your changes

This design proposal aims to provide a solution for adding a third data source for composition patches next to claim/composite and composed resource by introducing a new resource `EnvironmentConfig`.

It is _not_ the goal of this design document to provide a way for patching from any Kubernetes object (aka generic referencers).

CC @negz 

Related to https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/issues/2099

Implementation: https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3007

I have:

### How has this code been tested

n.a.

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ApplicationSet
spec:
  generators:
  - git:
      repoURL: https://github.com/argoproj/applicationset.git
      revision: HEAD
      directories:
      - path: examples/git-generator-directory/cluster-addons/*
  template:
    spec:
      destination:
        namespace: '{{path.basename}}'

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
spec:
  destination:
    namespace: 'argo-workflows'

resources:
    - base:
        apiVersion: rancher2.rancher.jet.crossplane.io/v1alpha1
        kind: Namespace
        metadata:
          name: <value somehow provided by Application.argoproj.io/v1alpha1 spec.destination.namespace>
        spec:
          forProvider:
          projectId: <value somehow referenced from the Project XR, use case 1>

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible.
